name: shopping_promotion_11
description: Real-world shopping mall promotional email with vague event mention but no specific date/time

input.subject: 💘 Book Now: CHANEL Fragrance and Beauty Boutique Shopping Event
input.snippet: Inside: Nordstrom sale, a free bag from Free People and more
input.body_text:
Inside: Nordstrom sale, a free bag from Free People and more

View in browser

A SPECIAL VALENTINE’S DAY
SHOPPING EVENT

Visit the CHANEL Fragrance and Beauty boutique to find a gem of a gift for you or someone else among a selection of fragrance, makeup and skincare, as well as eyewear and small leather goods.

BOOK HERE

NORDSTROM END OF SEASON SALE

Up to 50% Off. Save big on winter styles.

SALE DETAILS + MORE

BECAUSE FREE PEOPLE LOVES YOU

Feel the love next time you shop in-store with a Valentine's Day edition of the signature shopping bag exclusively at Free People! Free with purchase, while supplies last.

EXPLORE FREE PEOPLE

TRY THIS: NEW SMOOTHIE

Palmetto Superfoods has got the greens - Introducing the Blade Smoothie: a high-performance blend crafted with Leaft Foods. It's clean, plant-powered fuel and now available at Palmetto Superfoods.

DIVE IN

EXPLORE THE SALES

Ready to find the best deals from all of your favorite brands? We've pulled them all together in one place.

CHECK IT OUT

1275 Broadway Plaza, Walnut Creek, CA 94596

©2026 MACERICH. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.

notes: Real-world promotional email from Broadway Plaza shopping mall. Despite 'Shopping Event' in subject and CHANEL Valentine's Day event mention, no specific date, time, or bookable details in body - just a 'BOOK HERE' link. Multiple store promotions (Nordstrom, Free People, Palmetto Superfoods). Images are promotional product/lifestyle photos. Should not extract a calendar event.
